list.title: LinkData.class.mjs
list.description: The definition of the class representing a link.

list.title: LinkTemplate.class.mjs
list.description: The definition of the class representing a link generation template.

list.title: Linkifier.class.mjs
list.description: The definition of the main Linkifier class which provides the link rendering functionality with the help of the other classes and modules.

list.title: PageData.class.mjs
list.description: The definition of the class representing a web page.

list.title: defaults.mjs
list.description: The default values used throughout the linkifier classes.

list.title: index.js
list.description: The module's entry point. This file determines what does and does not get exported by the module.

list.title: module:LinkData
list.description: This module provides as class for representing the information that can be used when rendering a link.

list.title: module:LinkData.LinkData
list.description: This constructor throws a {@link ValidationError} unless a valid URL is passed.

list.title: module:LinkData.LinkData#asPlainObject
list.description:
Get the link data as a plain object of the form:

{
    url: 'http://www.bartificer.net/',
    text: 'the link text',
    description: 'the link description',
    uri: {
        hostname: 'www.bartificer.net',
        path: '/',
        hasPath: false
    }
}

Note that the uri could contain more fields - it's initialised with output from the URI.parse() function from the URI module.

list.title: module:LinkData.LinkData#uri
list.description: Get the URL as a URI.js object.

list.title: module:LinkData.LinkData#url
list.description: Get or set the URL.

list.title: module:LinkTemplate
list.description: This module provides as class for representing a template used for generating links.

list.title: module:LinkTemplate.LinkTemplate#addFilter
list.description:
Add a filter to be applied to one or all fields.

If an invalid args are passed, the function does not save the filter or throw an error, but it does log a warning.

list.title: module:LinkTemplate.LinkTemplate#filtersFor
list.description: A function get the filter functions that should be applied to any given field.

list.title: module:LinkTemplate.LinkTemplate#templateString
list.description: Get the template string.

list.title: module:LinkTemplate.LinkTemplate#templateString
list.description: Set the template string. Should be in Mustache format. All values passed will be coerced to strings.

list.title: module:Linkifier
list.description: Linkifier's core link rendering functionality.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#defaultTemplate
list.description: The default link template.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#fetchPageData
list.description: Fetch the page data for a given URL.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#generateLink
list.description: Generate a link given a URL. By default the registered template for the URL's domain will be used, or, if none is registered, the overall default will be used (html).

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#getTemplate
list.description: Get a registered link template by name.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#getTemplateNameForDomain
list.description:
Get the data transformer function for a given domain.

Note that domains are searched from the subdomain up. For example, if passed the domain www.bartificer.net the function will first look for a transformer for the domain www.bartificer.net, if there's no transformer registered for that domain it will look for a transformer for the domain bartificer.net, if there's no transformer for that domain either it will return the default transformer.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#getTransformerForDomain
list.description:
Get the data transformer function for a given domain.

Note that domains are searched from the subdomain up. For example, if passed the domain www.bartificer.net the function will first look for a transformer for the domain www.bartificer.net, if there's no transformer registered for that domain it will look for a transformer for the domain bartificer.net, if there's no transformer for that domain either it will return the default transformer.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#registerDefaultTemplateMapping
list.description: Register a default template for use with a given domain. This template will override the overall default for this domain and all its subdomains.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#registerTemplate
list.description: Register a link template.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#registerTransformer
list.description: Register a data transformer function for a given domain.

list.title: module:Linkifier.Linkifier#templateNames
list.description: A list of the names of the registered link templates.

list.title: module:PageData
list.description: This module provides as class for representing the information extracted from web pages which can be used to generate the link data avaiable for rendering links.

list.title: module:PageData.PageData
list.description: This constructor throws a {@link ValidationError} unless a valid URL is passed.

list.title: module:PageData.PageData#addSecondaryHeading
list.description: Add a seconary heading.

list.title: module:PageData.PageData#addTopLevelHeading
list.description: Add a top-level heading.

list.title: module:PageData.PageData#asPlainObject
list.description:
Get the page data as a plain object of the form:

{
    url: 'http://www.bartificer.net/',
    title: 'the page title',
    topLevelHeadings: [ 'first h1', 'second h1' ],
    secondaryHeadings: [ 'first h2', 'second h2' ],
    mainHeading: 'first h1',
    uri: {
        hostname: 'www.bartificer.net',
        path: '/',
        hasPath: false
    }
}

Note that the uri could contain more fields - it's initialised with output from the URI.parse() function from the URI module.

list.title: module:PageData.PageData#domain
list.description: Get the domain-part of the URL as a string.

list.title: module:PageData.PageData#h1
list.description: A shortcut for .addTopLevelHeading().

list.title: module:PageData.PageData#h1s
list.description: An alias for .topLevelHeadings.

list.title: module:PageData.PageData#h2
list.description: A shortcut for .addSecondaryHeading().

list.title: module:PageData.PageData#h2s
list.description: An alias for .secondaryHeadings.

list.title: module:PageData.PageData#headings
list.description: Get the page's section headings.

list.title: module:PageData.PageData#mainHeading
list.description: The text from the most important heading on the page. If the page has h1 tags, the first one will be used, if not, the first h2 tag will be used, and if there's none of those either, an empty string will be returned.

list.title: module:PageData.PageData#secondaryHeadings
list.description: The page's secondary headings (h2 tags).

list.title: module:PageData.PageData#topLevelHeadings
list.description: The page's top-level headings (h1 tags).

list.title: module:cheerio
list.description: The module used to parse HTML documents in a jQuery-like way in the NodeJS.

list.title: module:defaults
list.description: This module provides default values for use by the various linkifier functions and classes. These separated out for clarity, helping users decide which values to override or augment.

list.title: module:defaults.linkTemplates
list.description: The collection of named link templates loaded by the Linkifier constructor.

list.title: module:defaults.speciallyCapitalisedWords
list.description: The default list of words with special capitalisations.

list.title: module:linkify
list.description: The package entry-point.

list.title: module:linkify.LinkData
list.description: The LinkData class use to store link properties like title and url.

list.title: module:linkify.LinkTemplate
list.description: The LinkTempalte class used for defining the templates for generating links.

list.title: module:linkify.Linkifier
list.description: The Linkifier class that encapsulates the link generations functionality.

list.title: module:linkify.PageData
list.description: The PageData class used to store webpage properties like title and headings.

list.title: module:linkify.VERSION
list.description: The module's current SEMVER version number.

list.title: module:linkify.linkify
list.description: An instantiated Linkifier object ready for use.

list.title: module:mustache
list.description: The templating system used to describe link templates and generaete links.

list.title: module:node-fetch
list.description: The NPM module used to fetch URLs over HTTP(S).

list.title: module:title-case
list.description: The module used for intelligent conversions to newspaper-style title-case.

list.title: module:urijs
list.description: The URI (URL) parser used to parse and process link targets.

list.title: module:url-slug
list.description: The module used to reverse URL slugs back to approximate page titles.

list.title: module:utilities
list.description: This module provides utility functions which are both used by the core code, and, available for use by users when defining link data transformers and link templates.

list.title: module:utilities.batchFixCustomWordCases
list.description: Batch-customise word casings in a string. E.g. force fbi to FBI, ios to iOS, etc..

list.title: module:utilities.escapeRegex
list.description:
Escape a string for use in regular expressions.

Note: this is not a standard Javascript feature as of April 2026, though it is coming in future versions of Javascript.

list.title: module:utilities.extractSlug
list.description: Extract the slug from a URL and convert it to a title-case string.

list.title: module:utilities.regulariseWhitespace
list.description: Regularise white space by replacing all sequences of whitespace characters with a single space and trimming leading and trailing whitespace.

list.title: module:utilities.stripQueryString
list.description: Strip the query string from a URL.

list.title: module:utilities.stripUTMParameters
list.description: Remove UTM parameters from the query string in a URL.

list.title: utilities.mjs
list.description: A collection of useful utility functions.
